mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO security_flow (id, task_id, type, source_symbol_id, sink_symbol_id, primary_chunk_id, source_description, sink_description, guard_summary, path_text, evidence_chunk_ids, confidence, resolved_edges, unresolved_edges) VALUES
(#{flow.id}, #{flow.taskId}, #{flow.type}, #{flow.sourceSymbolId}, #{flow.sinkSymbolId}, #{flow.primaryChunkId}, #{flow.sourceDescription}, #{flow.sinkDescription}, #{flow.guardSummary}, #{flow.pathText}, #{flow.evidenceChunkIds}, #{flow.confidence}, #{flow.resolvedEdges}, #{flow.unresolvedEdges})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM security_flow WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY type, primary_chunk_id, id

SELECT * FROM security_flow WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND (primary_chunk_id = #{chunkId} OR evidence_chunk_ids = CAST(#{chunkId} AS VARCHAR) OR evidence_chunk_ids LIKE CONCAT(CAST(#{chunkId} AS VARCHAR), ',%') OR evidence_chunk_ids LIKE CONCAT('%,', CAST(#{chunkId} AS VARCHAR), ',%') OR evidence_chunk_ids LIKE CONCAT('%,', CAST(#{chunkId} AS VARCHAR))) ORDER BY confidence, type, id
